title: Consultation: Guidelines for Canadian recreational water quality: Microbiological sampling and analysis - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation: Guidelines for Canadian recreational water quality: Microbiological sampling and analysis

## Current status: Closed
Opened on April 21, 2023, and closed to new input on June 20, 2023.
This technical document summarizes current information on microbiological sampling and analysis of recreational waters. We're looking for comments from regulatory authorities, decision makers and the public on the draft document.

## Join in: How to participate
Send us an email Send an email to water-eau@hc-sc.gc.ca with your ideas or comments to make yourself heard.
Participate by mail Send a letter with your ideas and input to the address in contact information below.

## Who is the focus of this consultation
We invite input from:
- federal, provincial and territorial regulatory and health protection agencies
- industry stakeholders
- academic communities
- non-governmental organizations

## Key questions for discussion
We're looking for comments on these topics:
- the proposed approach
- the potential impacts of implementation
We will use the information we gather from this consultation to revise the document as needed.
- Guidelines for Canadian Recreational Water Quality – Third Edition
Water and Air Quality Bureau Health Canada 269 Laurier Ave West Address Locator 4903B Ottawa ON K1A 0K9 Email: water-eau@hc-sc.gc.ca
